#  Approve Owner Invoices (Beta) 
#####  In Beta
This page details the modernized owner invoice experience.
#####  In Beta
This page details functionality that is not available in Procore's production environment. Access to the features documented here is limited to specific Procore customers who have signed the required agreement to participate in Procore's Company level Workflows Tool Beta Program. The content on this page is for informational purposes only and all information and content on this page is subject to change without any prior notice. To learn more, see [About the Workflows Beta Program](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/workflows-company/tutorials/about-the-workflows-tool).
##  Background 
The steps you use to approve an owner invoice depend on whether your team has enabled the Workflows tool and configured a custom Owner Invoice workflow.
##### Examples
**When the Workflows Tool is Disabled**
If Workflows is disabled, a user can simply change the invoice status to 'Approved'.
**When the Workflows Tool is Enabled**
If enabled, you can click the Start Workflow button to route the owner invoice through your custom approval workflow.
##  Things to Consider 
  * **Required User Permissions** :
    * _To approve an owner invoice without an Owner Invoice workflow_ : 'Admin' level permissions on the project's Prime Contracts tool.
    * _To approve an owner invoice with an Owner Invoice Workflow_ : You must be the assigned [Workflow Approver](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/workflows-user-guide/create-a-workflow-template) on the response step of the custom workflow.
  * **Additional Information** :
    * To learn more about the Workflows tool, see [Workflows](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/workflows-company/).
    * To learn more about owner invoices, see [Invoicing](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/).


##  Prerequisites 
  * [Create Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-owner-invoices)
  * Read [Best Practices for Creating an Owner Invoice Workflow](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/best-practices-for-creating-an-owner-invoice-workflow).


##  Steps 
The steps you follow depend on whether the Workflows tool is enabled or disabled in your environment.
#### WORKFLOWS ENABLED: START THE WORKFLOW & Approve the Invoice
If the Workflows tool is enabled, the [Workflow Manager](https://v2.support.procore.com/process-guides/workflows-user-guide/configure-workflow-templates-on-projects) must manually start the workflow and approve the invoice.
  1. Navigate to the project's **Invoicing** tool.
  2. Click the **Owner** tab.
  3. Locate the _Draft_ invoice to approve and click the **Invoice #** link to open it.
  4. Click **Start Workflow**.   
  
![Owner Invoice Start Workflow](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/a6c47ad107e9d3983dbc104f683883cd/5ff3438217bdebcb44f5893f45be84c4/owner-invoice-start-workflow.png?fm=webp)  
  
This places the invoice into the _Under Review_ status. The assigned Workflow Approvers must complete the approval steps. See [Respond to a Custom Workflow](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/workflows-company/tutorials/respond-to-a-workflow-on-a-project).


#### WORKFLOWS DISABLED: Approve the Invoice
If the Workflows tool is disabled, a user with 'Admin' level permissions on the Prime Contracts tool can approve the invoice:
  1. Navigate to the project's **Invoicing** tool.
  2. Click the **Owner** tab.
  3. Locate the invoice to approve and click its **Invoice #** link to open it.
  4. In the **General Information** card, click **Edit**.
  5. In the **Status** drop-down list, change the status to _Approved_.   
  
![Owner Invoice Change Status No Workflow](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/bf22b167a7bc79792fb7dd9dafc2801b/2bea1f6521e44c0df08cfce4712e3379/owner-invoice-change-status-no-workflow.png?fm=webp)  

  6. Click **Save**.   
The invoice is approved.


See Also
  * [Create Owner Invoices](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/prime-contracts-project/tutorials/create-owner-invoices)
  * [Best Practices for Creating an Owner Invoice Workflow](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/invoicing-project/tutorials/best-practices-for-creating-an-owner-invoice-workflow)

description: How to approve an owner invoice in the Project level Invoicing tool with and without the Workflows tool enabled.
